human_approval_required_for: selecting a deepening candidate to explore (Step 2 → Step 3 transition)
creating an ADR for a rejected candidate (only when load-bearing reason justifies it)

compositions.step_1_explore: uses Task tool subagent for codebase exploration
compositions.step_3_alternative_interfaces: chains to devloop:subagent-orchestration mode parallel for parallel design exploration
compositions.approved_candidate: hands off to devloop:refactor-workflow (intent phase adopts the candidate, plan phase encodes the deepened interface design)
compositions.domain_language_updates: shares CONTEXT.md update discipline with devloop:discover mode domain

boundaries.produces: deepening candidates, optional interface designs, ADR offers for rejections
boundaries.does_not_handle: named bug or feature requests (use bug-fix-workflow / feature-workflow)
